title: Design System: Ari Meeting
note: Marginalia applied to the outgoing (frozen) Tauri app. Canonical brand source is brand/BRAND.md + brand/tokens.json; this file + DESIGN.md are the load-bearing test fixtures for the Tauri UI (frontend/tests/lib/visual-system.test.mjs). Kept in lockstep with frontend/src/app/globals.css.

ink.note: Body ink — never pure black. The heading ink (Iron Gall #152C66) is a separate, non-interactive second ink.

heading.note: The second ink — headings/display text only. Non-interactive; never signals state; outside the accent budget.

accent.note: The sole interactive ink — selection, citations, links, speaker names. If it's Shin-kai, you can act on it.

rail.note: Sidebar ground — warm paper in both modes (espresso #2B2723 in dark). No navy rail; Marginalia has no two-world navy.

danger.note: Live capture, and destructive confirmation. Always labeled; never co-branded with the accent.

fontFamily.fallback: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, SF Pro Text, Segoe UI, sans-serif
fontFamily.note: Bricolage Grotesque (SIL OFL) is bundled locally at frontend/public/fonts/BricolageGrotesque-Variable.woff2 for headings/display only (>= 17px). Body/UI use the native SF Pro system stack; sub-17px headings use SF Pro Semibold.

display.purpose: Route-defining titles only, in Bricolage Grotesque and Iron Gall heading ink.

headline.purpose: Meeting titles and primary workspace sections; Bricolage Grotesque, heading ink.

body.purpose: Controls, explanation, transcript, and summary prose; SF Pro, body ink, 72ch measure.

label.purpose: Compact metadata and state labels; uppercase eyebrows use secondary ink, never accent or heading ink.

mono.purpose: Timestamps, models, formats, and technical values; tabular numerals.

shadows.name: focus-halo
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus paired with a solid Shin-kai outline.

motion.name: standard
motion.purpose: Sidebar, dialog, and panel state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary non-recording action on a screen — the one reserved solid Shin-kai fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary{height:36px;padding:0 14px;border:1px solid #1B3A8C;border-radius:6px;background:#1B3A8C;color:#FAF8F5;font:600 14px/1 -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"SF Pro Text",sans-serif;transition:background 180ms cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1),transform 120ms cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1)}.ds-btn-primary:hover{background:#16317A}.ds-btn-primary:active{background:#122763;transform:translateY(1px)}.ds-btn-primary:focus-visible{outline:2px solid #1B3A8C;outline-offset:2px;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(27,58,140,.18)}

components.name: Recording Button
components.description: Reserved for starting or representing active capture — recording red, never co-branded with the accent.
components.css: .ds-btn-record{height:36px;padding:0 14px;border:1px solid #C6362C;border-radius:6px;background:#C6362C;color:#FAF8F5;font:600 14px/1 -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"SF Pro Text",sans-serif;transition:filter 180ms cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1),transform 120ms cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1)}.ds-btn-record:hover{filter:brightness(.94)}.ds-btn-record:active{transform:translateY(1px)}.ds-btn-record:focus-visible{outline:2px solid #1B3A8C;outline-offset:2px;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(27,58,140,.18)}

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Supporting actions in headers, toolbars, and states.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary{height:36px;padding:0 14px;border:1px solid #E6E1D8;border-radius:6px;background:#FFFFFF;color:#2B2620;font:600 14px/1 -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"SF Pro Text",sans-serif;transition:background 180ms cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1),border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1)}.ds-btn-secondary:hover{background:#F1EDE6;border-color:#D8CFC2}.ds-btn-secondary:active{background:#E6E1D8}.ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible{outline:2px solid #1B3A8C;outline-offset:2px;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(27,58,140,.18)}

components.name: Search Field
components.css: .ds-field-label{display:grid;gap:6px;color:#6F6759;font:600 12px/1.3 -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"SF Pro Text",sans-serif}.ds-field{height:36px;padding:0 12px;border:1px solid #E6E1D8;border-radius:6px;background:#FFFFFF;color:#2B2620;font:400 14px/1 -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"SF Pro Text",sans-serif;transition:border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1),box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1)}.ds-field:hover{border-color:#D8CFC2}.ds-field:focus{outline:2px solid #1B3A8C;outline-offset:1px;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(27,58,140,.18)}

components.name: Navigation Item
components.description: Quiet warm-paper rail navigation with a clear current state (Shin-kai selection; the rail stays warm paper in both modes).
components.html: <nav class="ds-rail"><button class="ds-nav">Home</button><button class="ds-nav ds-nav-current">Saved meetings</button><button class="ds-nav">Ask meetings</button></nav>

components.name: Workspace Surface
components.description: A flat bounded reading or tool region, never a decorative nested card.
components.html:
Summary

The conversation remains the primary content.

narrative.overview: A private study, not a SaaS dashboard: two inks on warm paper. A porcelain paper canvas holds the meeting; a warm elevated-paper rail holds tools and state. The visual signature is Marginalia — porcelain and espresso grounds, warm-charcoal body ink with an Iron Gall heading ink (the second ink), and a scarce Shin-kai interactive accent — set in Bricolage Grotesque headings over an SF Pro body, with tight geometry and honest state language.
keyCharacteristics: Warm paper canvas with a warm elevated-paper rail (espresso in dark mode) — no navy.
Two inks: warm-charcoal body and non-interactive Iron Gall headings.
Restrained Shin-kai accent reserved for selection, citations, links, and speaker names.
Flat-by-default surfaces separated by warm tone and one-pixel rules.

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: The Shin-kai accent appears on no more than 8% of a screen and only for selection, citations, links, and speaker names. Solid accent fill is reserved for the one primary action per view.

rules.name: The Two-Ink Rule
rules.body: Body text is warm charcoal; headings and display text use the Iron Gall second ink. The heading ink is non-interactive and never signals state.

rules.name: The Warm Neutral Rule
rules.body: Every neutral is warm (porcelain, espresso, charcoal, taupe). Never introduce cool gray or blue-gray fills.

rules.name: The Flat Workspace Rule
rules.body: Static content surfaces do not float.

rules.name: The Product Voice Rule
rules.body: No marketing-scale greetings inside the desktop app; the largest type names the work currently open.

dos: Use the warm porcelain canvas and warm-paper rail as the primary compositional structure.
Keep the Shin-kai accent scarce and tied to interaction or citation.
Keep every neutral warm — porcelain, espresso, charcoal, taupe.
Render headings in Bricolage Grotesque and the Iron Gall heading ink.
Preserve every local behavior and keyboard path.
donts: Do not use cool gray or blue-gray neutrals; the palette is warm throughout.
Do not spread the Shin-kai accent onto labels, eyebrows, or decoration; do not use the heading ink interactively.
Do not reintroduce the retired golden-amber / navy-rail system.
Do not add fake metrics, progress, status, citations, or assistant states.
